description_long: This object consists of three distinct knives or swords, each with unique designs, standing upright on a dark, glossy square surface. The leftmost blade features a wide, double-edged design with a metallic sheen and a brown, contoured handle, possibly resembling a medieval dagger. The central blade is sleek and black, with a straight, narrow profile and a simple cylindrical handle, giving it a modern or tactical appearance. The rightmost object is a rapier-style sword with a thin, pointed blade and a prominent cup-shaped guard, accompanied by a rounded pommel and a slender grip. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the blades and guards, with wood or synthetic material for the handles. The overall presentation suggests these are display or collectible items, not intended for practical use. The objects are visually striking due to their contrasting forms and finishes.
description: A set of three visually distinct knives or swords, each with unique blade shapes and handle designs, displayed upright on a glossy dark surface.
description_view_0: Three knives or swords are seen from the front, clearly showing their blade shapes and handle details.
description_view_1: The objects are viewed from the side, with only the thin profile of the rightmost sword and its cup guard visible.
description_view_2: The set is seen from the back, highlighting the reverse side of the blades and handles.
description_view_3: A rear side view, showing the thinness of the blades and the cup guard of the rightmost sword.
attribute_blade_type: double-edged straight, single-edged straight, and rapier (thin, pointed)
attribute_handle_design: contoured wood, cylindrical black, slender with rounded pommel
